title: Investigate intermittent roadmap-status import SyntaxError during standalone CLI execution
description: Observed a non-deterministic SyntaxError referencing src/commands/roadmap-status.js during direct CLI invocation even though node --check and the test suite pass. Reproduce, isolate, and fix the loader or file-read issue if real.
triage_notes: Investigated intermittent roadmap-status import failures blocking unrelated commands; mitigated blast radius by lazy-loading roadmap-status in src/cli.js and verified concurrent roadmap-status, allocation-plan-record, and organization-audit runs complete successfully after the change.
